productDisplayName: Nike Men Air Monarch IV Navy Shoe
description: Take training to the next level with these nike Air Monarch shoes.  These shoes combine high quality materials and a sturdy design to deliver high performance action. Team these with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.Uppers Synthetic leather uppers for enhanced breathability, durability, Fit and feel Lace-ups for a snug fit Synthetic overlays along the edges of the shoe ensure high-quality detailing and add on a more streamlined silhouette and added support and durability to the upper Cushioned collar and tongue for greater comfort Mesh tongue for greater breathability Appliqued swoosh on the sides Embroidered brand names on the tongue and behind collar Midsole Full-length Air-Sole unit for cushioning for the best in comfort and protection Phylon midsole  offering comfort, durability and support at its best Outsole Durable solid rubber outsole for better multidirection traction Forefoot outrigger gives additional stability Outsole is made of rubber with a herringbone pattern that enhances traction and durability Flex grooves created along the outsole flexes and bends naturally along with your foot, giving your strides a comfort feel Pivot point on the big toe mound for easier 180 degree movement Shoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
